phylopq 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

phylopq

phylopq is the phylogenetic analysis layer of the pqverse ecosystem. It operates on phyloseq objects and builds on top of ape and MiscMetabar.

Status

This package is in early development (version 0.0.0.9000). It is scaffolded but does not yet ship any functions. The first migrations will follow the phylopq section of the pqverse ROADMAP.

Installation

You can install the development version of phylopq from GitHub with:

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("adrientaudiere/phylopq")

Example 

library(phylopq)
library(phyloseq)
data(GlobalPatterns, package = "phyloseq")

Scope

phylopq is for phylogeny-aware work on a single phyloseq object: tree construction from taxonomy tables, phylogenetic distance metrics, phylogeny-aware ordinations, and integration with external placement tools. It does not perform general statistical analysis (use netaipq), multi-phyloseq comparison (use comparpq) or pure ggplot2 wrappers (use ggplotpq).
